x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or entity that owns the account from which funds are swept (debited).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Source Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description: The bank that holds the source account and transfers funds out during the sweep.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description: Government or official bodies that oversee sweep arrangements, ensuring compliance with banking regulations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Beneficiary
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or entity that owns the account receiving the swept funds (credited).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Beneficiary Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description: The bank that holds the beneficiary account and receives the swept funds
